subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth in remembrance of that which hath caused the face of the Cause of God to unveil its splendor betwixt earth and heaven
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق و فیه یذکر ما یلوح به وجه الامر بین الارضین و السموات قل
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
